name: Dutchie Cannabis Point-of-Sale API
what_it_does: Dutchie REST API for cannabis dispensary point-of-sale and e-commerce platform. Enables AI agents to manage cannabis product inventory and menus, process transactions with compliance checks, integrate with state seed-to-sale tracking (METRC, BioTrack), handle online ordering and delivery workflows, manage patient and customer records with age verification, access sales analytics, and connect dispensary data with wholesale procurement systems.
use_cases: Managing cannabis product menus and inventory from dispensary operations agents
Processing point-of-sale transactions with compliance validation from retail agents
Syncing inventory with METRC state tracking systems from compliance agents
Handling online ordering and delivery coordination from e-commerce agents
not_for: Non-cannabis retail without seed-to-sale compliance requirements
Cannabis cultivation without retail dispensary point-of-sale focus
States where cannabis remains illegal without applicable licensing
best_when: A licensed cannabis dispensary or multi-state operator (MSO) using Dutchie wants AI agents to automate inventory management, transaction processing, METRC compliance reporting, and online ordering workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY+FINANCIAL RISK: Cannabis retail requires state licensing and strict regulatory compliance. Automated operations must comply with state cannabis regulations including seed-to-sale tracking. Operating in states where cannabis is not legal is illegal.

auth.notes: Dutchie uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dispensary-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. GraphQL API available alongside REST. Scopes control access to inventory, transactions, and compliance data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cannabis dispensary enterprise SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly pricing; enterprise pricing for multi-state operators
pricing.notes: Bend, Oregon company, founded 2017. Largest cannabis retail technology platform in the US. Includes POS, e-commerce, payments, and marketplace. 6,000+ dispensary locations. Raised $350M in venture funding.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires valid state dispensary license and strict regulatory compliance
No public MCP server — REST and GraphQL APIs with OAuth2 partner program
METRC/seed-to-sale integration is compliance-critical — validation errors can result in regulatory action
Age verification must be enforced for all sales — automated transactions must include ID check confirmation
US data residency only — cannabis regulations vary by state
Payment processing is complex for cannabis — banking limitations mean cash/debit-only in many jurisdictions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis customer purchase and compliance data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency. State cannabis licensing and METRC compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis customer data with compliance requirements. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. State licensing and METRC compliance mandatory.
